description: Setup environment: install dependencies, run existing tests to confirm baseline is green.
steps: Run pytest tests/ -v --tb=short --ignore=tests/test_upload.py --ignore=tests/test_new_tools.py --ignore=tests/test_final_push.py to confirm all existing tests pass
findings: Default system Python is 3.9.25 which does not meet >=3.10 requirement. Used pyenv shell 3.11.15. Set pyenv local 3.11.15 so .python-version file anchors future runs. All 780 tests pass in ~24s. pytest-asyncio 1.4.0 installed (mode=auto). curl_cffi installed but tests mock it via conftest.py.
